modmenu.summaryTranslation.moreswordsmod: Adds custom melee and magical weapons with distinct combat identities.
modmenu.descriptionTranslation.moresword: More Swords Mod adds katanas, staffs, the Bone Scythe, and the Obsidian Greatsword with mechanics built around timing, mobility, summoning, and heavy impact.
tooltip.moreswordsmod.katana_hilt.flavor: A wrapped grip balanced for quick, disciplined cuts.
tooltip.moreswordsmod.copper_guard.flavo: Warm copper shaped for quick early duels.
tooltip.moreswordsmod.iron_guard.flavor: Plain iron shaped to steady a duelist's hand.
tooltip.moreswordsmod.golden_guard.flavo: Soft gold polished for speed over endurance.
tooltip.moreswordsmod.diamond_guard.flav: A hard blue guard cut for flawless control.
tooltip.moreswordsmod.netherite_guard.fl: Ancient alloy that turns aside heat and hesitation.
tooltip.moreswordsmod.copper_katana_blad: A ruddy edge that favors tempo over endurance.
A reliable edge with enough bite to teach patience.
tooltip.moreswordsmod.golden_katana_blad: A bright, featherlight edge that demands precision.
tooltip.moreswordsmod.diamond_katana_bla: A cold edge honed for clean, punishing openings.
tooltip.moreswordsmod.netherite_katana_b: A blackened edge that refuses to dull or yield.
tooltip.moreswordsmod.arcane_rod.flavor: A rod etched with quiet channels for focused magic.
tooltip.moreswordsmod.withered_rib.flavo: A brittle bone still stained by nether rot.
tooltip.moreswordsmod.scattered_wings.fl: Torn membrane that remembers the shape of flight.
tooltip.moreswordsmod.soul_essence.flavo: Faint light caught between a whisper and a flame.
tooltip.moreswordsmod.withered_stalk.fla: A dead stem that drinks in lingering curses.
tooltip.moreswordsmod.zephyr_gem.flavor: A pale gem with wind trapped under its surface.
tooltip.moreswordsmod.copper_katana.flav: A ruddy training blade with a sharper bite than its soft shine suggests.
tooltip.moreswordsmod.copper_katana.abil: After 3 seconds without landing a hit,
your next strike bursts forward with bonus damage.
Airborne targets are popped higher for juggle combos.
Primed strikes pierce shields and disable them briefly.
During the dash, projectiles are blocked completely,
melee damage is halved, and knockback is ignored.
tooltip.moreswordsmod.iron_katana.flavor: A disciplined blade that rewards patience over panic.
tooltip.moreswordsmod.iron_katana.abilit: After 3 seconds without landing a hit,
your next strike bursts forward with bonus damage.
Airborne targets are popped higher for juggle combos.
Primed strikes pierce shields and disable them briefly.
During the dash, projectiles are blocked completely,
melee damage is halved, and knockback is ignored.
tooltip.moreswordsmod.golden_katana.flav: Swift, light, and merciless in practiced hands.
tooltip.moreswordsmod.golden_katana.abil: After 3 seconds without landing a hit,
your next strike bursts forward with bonus damage.
Airborne targets are popped higher for juggle combos.
Primed strikes pierce shields and disable them briefly.
During the dash, projectiles are blocked completely,
melee damage is halved, and knockback is ignored.
tooltip.moreswordsmod.diamond_katana.fla: A duelist's weapon that weakens those who fail to keep up.
tooltip.moreswordsmod.diamond_katana.abi: After 3 seconds without landing a hit,
your next strike bursts forward and may inflict Weakness.
Airborne targets are popped higher for juggle combos.
Primed strikes pierce shields and disable them briefly.
During the dash, projectiles are blocked completely,
melee damage is halved, and knockback is ignored.
tooltip.moreswordsmod.netherite_katana.f: A flawless killing edge forged for relentless precision.
tooltip.moreswordsmod.netherite_katana.a: After 3 seconds without landing a hit,
your next strike bursts forward and may inflict Weakness.
Airborne targets are popped higher for juggle combos.
Primed strikes pierce shields and disable them briefly.
During the dash, projectiles are blocked completely,
melee damage is halved, and knockback is ignored.
tooltip.moreswordsmod.lightning_staff.fl: A storm rod that answers clean intent with brutal thunder.
tooltip.moreswordsmod.lightning_staff.ab: Right-click: call lightning where you aim.
Direct hits burn and damage the struck mob.
Susceptible mobs still transform when struck.
tooltip.moreswordsmod.wind_staff.flavor: A roaming gale bound into a staff of impossible lightness.
tooltip.moreswordsmod.wind_staff.leap_de: Right-click: burst in your aim direction.
Direct hits launch targets and inflict Levitation briefly.
While mounted: boosts your ride forward and off the ground.
tooltip.moreswordsmod.wind_staff.glide_d: Shift while falling: slow descent and cancel drop damage.
tooltip.moreswordsmod.bone_scythe.flavor: A grave-hook that stores the dying hatred of fallen monsters.
tooltip.moreswordsmod.bone_scythe.harves: Kills store imprints and can grant tier-based Soul Charges.
tooltip.moreswordsmod.bone_scythe.siphon: Right-click: turn all charges into weight during a 10-second summon window.
tooltip.moreswordsmod.bone_scythe.call_d: Right-click during window: summon the selected soul.
tooltip.moreswordsmod.bone_scythe.bindin: Shift + Right-click: cycle the selected stored soul.
tooltip.moreswordsmod.bone_scythe.recall: Shift + Left-click/Bound Recall key: recall fresh souls for half-weight charges.
tooltip.moreswordsmod.bone_scythe.garris: Middle-click/Bound Garrison Key: pull all summons toward you and focus nearby foes.
tooltip.moreswordsmod.obsidian_greatswor: A slab of volcanic ruin built to break lines and bones alike.
Right-click at 65%+ swing charge to unleash a shockwave.
Heavy swings also punch through half of a target's armor.
message.moreswordsmod.obsidian_greatswor: Not enough swing charge for Grand Slam.
advancements.moreswordsmod.root.title: More Swords Mod
advancements.moreswordsmod.root.descript: Wield a weapon from More Swords Mod.
advancements.moreswordsmod.sheath_strike: Land a primed Sheath Strike with a katana.
advancements.moreswordsmod.stormcall.des: Call lightning with the Lightning Staff.
advancements.moreswordsmod.gale_glide.de: Use the Wind Staff to glide after a long fall.
advancements.moreswordsmod.tier_5_reaped: Summon a Tier 5 reaped soul with the Bone Scythe.
advancements.moreswordsmod.grand_slam_th: Hit three enemies with one Obsidian Greatsword Grand Slam.
subtitles.moreswordsmod.bone_scythe.summ: Bone Scythe opens a summoning window
Bone Scythe closes a summoning window
subtitles.moreswordsmod.bone_scythe.reve: Bone Scythe calls a reaped soul
